creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Älven from comment #7)

This is because you kept updating the patch after I already had it in for build testing.  Please avoid that in the future.  "maintainer-approval+" means "this patch is ready to be committed as is," so please treat the flag as such.  If you want to incrementally improve on the patch, either post the patch as WIP for review or only upload it once you are done.

For me as a committer, I have to go back and retest / review your patch across eight different system configurations every time you submit a new version.  That's a lot of work that I would prefer to avoid if possible.
